# Clay — Pricing

## Plans

| Plan | Monthly (Monthly) | Monthly (Annual) | Key Features |
|------|---------|----------|-------------|
| **Free** | Free | Free | 6,000 actions/year, 1.2K data credits/year, unlimited seats/tables, 200 rows/table |
| **Launch** | $167/mo | $54–$261/mo | 180K–120K+ actions/year, 30K–72K data credits/year, phone enrichment, job change signals, email campaigns |
| **Growth** (Recommended) | $446/mo | $185–$413/mo | 480K–120K+ actions/year, 72K data credits/year, CRM auto-sync, HTTP API, webhook signals, 1 ads audience |
| **Enterprise** | Custom | Custom | Data warehouse sync, 2 ads audiences, unlimited rows/audiences, SSO, RBAC, dedicated strategist |

## Credit / Usage Model

- Credit-based system — every data enrichment action consumes credits regardless of whether data is returned
- 1 credit ≈ 1 enrichment action (e.g. finding an email, running a Claygent AI research step, waterfall enrichment attempt)
- Waterfall enrichment (trying multiple providers in sequence) can consume multiple credits per contact
- Claygent (AI web research agent) is particularly credit-intensive

## TCO Notes

- Clay is a data enrichment and workflow orchestration layer, not a sending tool — must be paired with Instantly, Smartlead, or similar
- Credit costs can escalate quickly with waterfall enrichment + AI steps; model your expected enrichment depth before committing
- The high Pro/Enterprise price reflects the power of the platform for complex, multi-source enrichment workflows
- ROI is highest when replacing a manual research team or combining 5+ data sources into one workflow
